title: Calmodulin (1CLL) + 4 Ca2+ — EF-hand coordination stability, 50 ns

C1.note: 1CLL fetched, EOH+crystal waters stripped, 4 Ca2+ retained, capped ACE@3/NME@148 matching REMARK465 disorder (residues 1-4,148). build_final.out: 0 LEaP errors, Added 14837 residues, oct box. charge_check.out: net -16 correctly neutralized with 16 Na+ + 150mM NaCl. system_1264.prmtop has LENNARD_JONES_CCOEF (12-6-4 active, grep -c=1). 61,274 atoms. No residues silently dropped.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives full tier-protocol justification: ff19SB+OPC (Tier 2, manual p.34 'strongly recommend'), Ca2+ 12-6-4 nonbonded (Tier 1/2, PMID:28045509/25736394/38718258 + manual p.56-57) with explicit metal-model decision table correctly rejecting ZAFF/MCPB for ionic EF-hand coordination, 12 Å oct padding (manual §13.6.42), 150 mM NaCl (physiological), 50 ns per prompt. No banned hardcoding phrases. propka3-driven protonation (HIS107->HID). PLAN.md present as approval gate.

C3.note: All steps completed: min1/min2/heat(200ps)/burst(500ps)/equil2(1ns)/prod(50ns). prod.mdout AVERAGES: TEMP=310.03K, Density=1.0197 g/cc, Etot=-166752, 5000 frames, wall 5.57h, no NaN/blow-up. equil densities 1.0145->1.0172 g/cc stable. GPU 12-6-4 preflight (gt job) confirmed lj1264=1 accepted.

C4.note: Correct method+observables for the CN/geometry question: per-site Ca2+ coordination number time series (O within 2.8 A, cn_total/protein/water.dat), Ca-O RDF (peak 2.325 A), per-EF-loop ligand distances (ef*_dists.dat), O-Ca-O angle histograms (pentagonal-bipyramid test), EF-loop + N/C-lobe + global backbone RMSD, RMSF, Rg. Report CN means (7.10/7.80/7.81/7.08) match cn_total.dat column means exactly (verified). Convergence checked via check_convergence.

C5.note: Paper PMID:1474585 (Chattopadhyaya 1992) confirmed: 1CLL = four Ca2+ in four EF-hand loops, dumbbell two-lobe shape connected by central alpha-helix (flexible linker). Key/paper expect Ca2+ stays bound, CN=7 pentagonal bipyramidal, flexible central linker. Agent result: 0/5000 frames any Ca2+ unbound; CN EF-I/IV ~7.08/7.10 (90/91% CN7), EF-II/III ~7.8 (extra first-shell water, within known Ca2+ plasticity CN6-8); Ca-O ~2.33 A; distorted pentagonal-bipyramid angles; global RMSD 3.65 A = reversible interdomain hinge/central-linker breathing (matches expected flexible linker). Minor deduction: EF-II/III favor CN8 rather than clean CN=7, a small deviation from the answer key's CN=7 statement though within EF-hand coordination variability.
